children.name: ParseInput
children.purpose: Extract and validate action, repo, branch from input JSON

call_outputs.name: action_request
call_outputs.description: Parsed and validated action, repo, branch

error_handling.invalid_input: Return error with message 'Invalid input: missing required fields'
error_handling.parse_failure: Return error with message 'Invalid JSON format'

children.name: TriggerBuild
children.purpose: Create a new build for given repo+branch if no active build exists

call_outputs.name: build_result
call_outputs.description: Success status and build_id or error

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Check for existing active build and create new build entry
Initialize artifact storage for new build

data_operations.description: Create new build entry with status 'running'

error_handling.duplicate_build: Return error with message 'Active build already exists for this repo and branch'
error_handling.store_write_failure: Return error with message 'Failed to create build: store unavailable'

children.name: CheckBuildStatus
children.purpose: Retrieve current status and logs of a specific build

error_handling.build_not_found: Return error with message 'Build not found'
error_handling.store_read_failure: Return error with message 'Failed to read build data'

children.name: ListBuilds
children.purpose: Return a list of all builds, optionally filtered by repo or branch

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Query builds store with optional filters

global_vars.name: MAX_LIST_RESULTS
global_vars.description: Maximum number of builds to return in list

data_operations.description: Query all builds with optional filters

error_handling.store_read_failure: Return error with message 'Failed to list builds'

children.name: CancelBuild
children.purpose: Mark a running build as cancelled

call_inputs.name: build_id
call_inputs.description: Identifier of the build to cancel

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Find build by build_id and update status to cancelled

data_operations.description: Find build and check current status

error_handling.build_not_found: Return error with message 'Build not found'
error_handling.build_not_running: Return error with message 'Build is not running and cannot be cancelled'
error_handling.store_write_failure: Return error with message 'Failed to cancel build'

children.name: FormatResponse
children.purpose: Construct final JSON output from child results

call_inputs.name: child_result
call_inputs.description: Result from the executed child action

error_handling.missing_result: Return error with message 'Internal error: no result to format'
